full_text:
Zhongli Wei 鍾離禕
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhongli Wei (鍾離禕)was born in Shanyin county, Kuaiji commandery. When his father died, took over command of his troops. Zhongli Wei was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
